boundary.interpretation: Native route arbitration removes the experiment-supplied route selection caveat and proves the selected topology event can be replayed through lineage, reabsorption, producer scheduling, and step processing. It still does not serialize a stable RC coherence-basin identity or validate attractor-basin invariance through topology mutation.
